name: Black Bean Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 cup black beans, drained and rinsed
3 cups ricotta cheese, part-skim milk, fat removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, and mushrooms to the skillet. Cook and stir for 5 minutes, or until vegetables are lightly browned. If necessary, add a little more liquid.
3. Stir in oregano, basil, and parsley. Add tomato juice and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Add black beans, tomatoes, and tomato paste to the skillet. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. To assemble, place a layer of cooked lasagna noodles in a 9 x 13 baking dish. Top with a layer of black bean sauce, followed by layers of ricotta cheese, more lasagna noodles, and additional black bean sauce.
7. Repeat the layers until the dish is full, ending with a final layer of ricotta cheese. Spread any remaining black bean sauce over the top.
8. Sprinkle parmesan cheese evenly over the surface.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
10. Let the lasagna stand for 15 minutes before serving.
